name: Urban Growth: Phoenix 2015-2024
description: Phoenix is one of America's fastest-growing cities. This analysis tracks urban expansion using the full Sentinel-2 archive from 2015 to present.
key_findings: Suburban sprawl visible in satellite imagery
Fastest growth in Gilbert, Buckeye, and Surprise suburbs
methodology_notes: Urban expansion tracked using GAIA impervious surface dataset (year of transition) and GHSL built-up layers. Annual rate calculated via linear regression on built-up area time series.
